category_sources: source_facts.description says Rex executes commands on remote servers; official RexOps/Rex README describes Rex as an automation framework using local and remote execution.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rex; official RexOps/Rex README uses the project name Rex.
docs_sources: Official rexify.org site has a dedicated Documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official RexOps/Rex GitHub repository identifies itself as Rex and links www.rexify.org.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables show a command-line remote execution tool; official README describes local/remote execution, SSH-style automation, and Perl-based Rex code.
